CustomField.formula: IF(DAY(DATEVALUE(EndDate)) < 10, '0' + TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(EndDate))), TEXT(DAY(DATEVALUE(EndDate)))) +'/'+ IF(MONTH(DATEVALUE(EndDate)) < 10, '0' + TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(EndDate))), TEXT(MONTH(DATEVALUE(EndDate)))) +'/'+ TEXT(YEAR(DATEVALUE(EndDate)))
CustomField.label: EndDateValue
